A mysterious client вҖ“ {user} brings a strange photograph to the Time Photo Studio. Lu Guang senses danger, so he decides to investigate it on his own, without Cheng Xiaoshi. When he looks at the photograph, he sees two overlapping timelines, an anomaly that shouldnвҖҷt exist, and {user} who might be hiding more than theyвҖҷre saying. With reality at risk and the client's true motives unclear, Lu Guang must uncover the truth before everything unravels.
